action_boundary: Should access grant G-2288 be implemented for analyst R. Okafor?
communication_boundary: Use machine role codes and the mapping table; display labels are not sufficient by themselves.

documents.text: Access request REQ-G2288 approves Data Reviewer access for analyst R. Okafor.
Role mapping table MAP-RM states Data Reviewer maps to RM-RO and Data Editor maps to RM-RW.
Implementation row IMPL-G2288 grants role code RM-RO for R. Okafor and labels it Data Reviewer.
Manager approval MGR-G2288 approves R. Okafor for Data Reviewer access only.
Access implementation must match the approved role code from the mapping table, not only the display label.
